mapper.select: SELECT id as game_id, name, description, cover_image, category, status FROM game WHERE id = #{gameId}
SELECT id as game_id, name, description, cover_image, category, status FROM game WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id as game_id, name, description, cover_image, category, status FROM game WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game (name, description, cover_image, category, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{category}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, category = #{category}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{gameId}
